payload.answer: This appears to be the same Slack event delivered twice, so it should be treated as a duplicate rather than a new memory.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
repair_options: Treat the second delivery as a duplicate and ignore it.
Keep both as separate events only if you need event-delivery tracking, not as a new fact about Sam.
If unsure whether the payloads differ, ask to compare the event bodies before deciding.
